creator: billf@jade.chc-chimes.com
text:
A little(and I mean little) command line viewer for X. handles multiple files 
well, a _really_ nice program.

billf@jade$ ls -l `which qiv`
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  16384 Sep  9 17:42 /usr/local/bin/qiv

It also consists of one source file, which needless to say was easy to port. 
Regardless, this is one tool that anyone who runs X should have.
